Thanks for sending a PR! Please fill in the sections below so reviewers can
land your change quickly.
-->

## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences: what does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix
- [ ] ✨ Feature
- [ ] 🧹 Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] 📚 Documentation
- [ ] 🧪 Tests only
- [ ] 🔧 Build / tooling

## How was this tested?

<!--
- Unit tests added / updated?
- Manual repro before & after?
- Smoke-tested against a local LanceDB (default ~/.gemdex/lance)?
-->

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm build` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes (if behaviour changed)
- [ ] README / docs updated if user-visible behaviour changed
- [ ] No `eslint-disable` added; no silent fallbacks for required config

## Linked issues

<!-- e.g. Closes #123 -->
